tools.name: OpenPlaywrightSocketsRoomRecording
tools.title: Open Playwright Sockets Room Recording
tools.description: Open the Playwright Sockets remote browser app, navigate to start_url, begin recording, and save the recording into the current Playground room when returned. If the user did not provide a URL, ask for one before calling this tool.

start_url.title: Start URL
start_url.description: URL to open. Bare hostnames such as google.com are prefixed with https://.

recording_name_hint.title: Recording Name Hint
recording_name_hint.description: Optional short name or description for the recording.

tools.name: PlayPlaywrightSocketsRoomRecording
tools.title: Play Playwright Sockets Room Recording
tools.description: Open Playwright Sockets and replay the current Playground room recording that best matches a natural-language description or filename. If the user did not identify a recording, ask which room recording to play before calling this tool.

recording_name_hint.title: Room Recording Name Hint
recording_name_hint.description: Natural-language description of the Playground room recording, such as google.com or login flow.

project_id.title: Fallback Project ID
project_id.description: Optional accessible Playwright project to search as a fallback.

start_url.title: Start URL
start_url.description: Optional URL override to open before replaying the recording.
